chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Revision Application No. S- 01 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA No.142/2023 3. For order on MA No.143/2023 4. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2024. None has appeared for the applicant, no intimation received. Same was position on the last two dates of hearing. Accordingly this Criminal Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Irfan/PA
